name: Continuous Integration Suite

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, master ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main, master ]

jobs:
  validate-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: 1. Checkout Source Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: 2. Initialize Node.js Environment
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: 20.x
        cache: 'npm'

    - name: 3. Install Project Dependencies
      run: npm ci

    - name: 4. Verify Next.js Compilation Stability
      run: npm run build
      env:
        # Prevents compilation crashes by mocking environment configuration
        NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL: "supabase.co"
        SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: "mock-service-role-key-for-build-validation"
        UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL: "upstash.io"
        UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN: "mock-redis-token-for-build-validation"

    - name: 5. Execute Automated Audit Engine Tests
      run: npm run test
